objections.objection_text: Is this public sharing just my ego/devil trying to make me prideful?
objections.underlying_belief: Vulnerability and sharing are dangerous to my spiritual health.
objections.underlying_fear: Becoming an 'influencer' for the wrong reasons.
objections.counter_truth_angle: God will help you see if you're doing it out of pride later; right now, the mission requires your voice. Don't let the fear of pride paralyze the duty of evangelism.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: Oh, is this the devil kind of like trying to be prideful? ... I will say that that can be handled later. Like, God will help you see if you're doing it out of pride and help you overcome that
